title: Ōmiya Hachiman Shrine
summary:
Ōmiya Hachiman Shrine may refer to:

Ōmiya Hachiman Shrine (Hyōgo), a shinto shrine in Miki, Hyōgo, Japan
Ōmiya Hachiman Shrine (Tokyo), a shinto shrine in Suginami, Tokyo, Japan
